body:
## Release Order

1. `ssot-contracts`
2. `ssot-views`
3. `ssot-codegen`
4. `ssot-core`
5. `ssot-cli`
6. `ssot-tui`
7. `ssot-registry`

## Compatibility Gates

- `ssot-contracts`, `ssot-views`, `ssot-codegen`, `ssot-core`, and `ssot-registry` SHALL share one version.
- Dependencies among those lockstep packages SHALL pin the shared core version exactly.
- `ssot-cli` and `ssot-tui` SHALL depend on compatible ranges for `ssot-core` and `ssot-contracts`.
- `ssot-registry` SHALL bundle the canonical runtime by depending on `ssot-core`, `ssot-cli`, and `ssot-contracts`.
- Release automation SHALL validate train order and dependency constraints before tags are created.
summary: Release train order and compatibility gates
title: Release train order and compatibility gates
